summary: Fleet Portal Pagination & Collapsible Panel - Complete testing of server-side pagination for Mes Reservations and collapsible Missions non affectees panel on Planning page. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend E2E tests passed for pagination controls, total count display, page navigation, and collapsible panel toggle.

minor.issue: Page 0 returns page=0 in response instead of clamping to 1 (though skip calculation correctly uses 0). Minor inconsistency.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting (span inside select/option) - React dev tools injection, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 2959 reservations from Google Sheets bulk import.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet Portal pagination and collapsible panel fully functional. Mes Reservations page now shows server-side pagination with 50 items per page, total count (2959), and page navigation (60 pages). Planning page has collapsible 'Missions non affectees' panel that starts collapsed and expands on click. Bulk import endpoint POST /api/fleet/planning/sheet/bulk-import is working. Imported missions visible on March 24-25 with correct driver assignments.

backend_pagination_tests: GET /api/fleet/my-bookings returns paginated response structure (bookings, total, page, limit, totalPages) ✓
Page 2 returns different bookings than page 1 ✓
Page 0 returns same data as page 1 ✓
Last page has correct remaining bookings ✓
frontend_pagination_tests: Mes Reservations shows total count: '2959 reservations dans votre planning' ✓
frontend_collapsible_panel_tests: Planning page loads with collapsible panel ✓
Expanded panel shows mission details with 'Affecter' button ✓
planning_navigation_tests: Imported missions show with correct drivers ✓
